description: You are a display engineer configuring a satellite tracking dashboard for the National Hurricane Center (NHC) control room in Miami. Delete the default 'Amateur' module and add a ground station named 'Miami_NHC' at 25.7543 N, 80.3823 W (Altitude: 2 meters). Create a module named 'GEO_WX' using the 'Miami_NHC' ground station with a 'Map' visual layout, containing GOES 16 (NORAD 41866), GOES 18 (NORAD 51850), and METEOSAT 11 (NORAD 40732). Create another module named 'LEO_WX' using the 'Miami_NHC' ground station with a 'Polar' visual layout, containing NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-C (NORAD 43689), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Configure GPredict to display UTC time. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
